name: Edwin Hawkins
abstract: Edwin Reuben Hawkins (August 19, 1943 – January 15, 2018) was an American gospel musician, pianist, vocalist, choir master, composer, and arranger. He was one of the originators of the urban contemporary gospel sound.

concerts.label: The Gospel Concert Rally featuring Edwin Hawkins

about_quotes.speaker: Leonidas Raymond Young
about_quotes.evidence: he had detected, that they had Edwin Hawkins -- it said the Edwin Hawkins Singers on their album; you know, the people who did "Oh Happy Day"
